title: Your favorite scene in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Your favorite scene in Evangelion?             Quote Post by terminus » Sun May 18, 2008 9:59 pm What's your favorite scene in Evangelion? personally mine's the scene (about the same in both Rebuild and TV version) where Shinji breaks open Rei's capsule and tells her to smile, and she does. For some odd reason I just like this scene. Maybe because it's charming or dramatic..

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun May 18, 2008 10:03 pm I would love to give you an answer to this question, but for me, it's like asking how many stars are in the sky. I honestly have no idea. But if it was life or death, knife to my throat. I guess it would be when Asuka sleep walks into Shinji's bed, and Shinji almost kisses her. No it's not because I'm a perv, but because it shows how Shinji really feels towards Asuka. It also shows how weak willed Shinji is because he didn't kiss her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 18, 2008 10:03 pm When Sachi was WTFPWNing Unit-01.

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Sun May 18, 2008 10:32 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: I would love to give you an answer to this question, but for me, it's like asking how many stars are in the sky. I honestly have no idea. But if it was life or death, knife to my throat. I guess it would be when Asuka sleep walks into Shinji's bed, and Shinji almost kisses her. No it's not because I'm a perv, but because it shows how Shinji really feels towards Asuka. It also shows how weak willed Shinji is because he didn't kiss her.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 18, 2008 10:37 pm tough question. its much easier to ask my least favorite scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun May 18, 2008 11:33 pm Yui-sama busting out of Leliel. Definitely the coolest scene in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 1:10 am Eva-01 eating Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 19, 2008 1:11 am One More Final: I Need You Hands down best ending ever

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon May 19, 2008 2:24 am IrkenEvangelion wrote: But if it was life or death, knife to my throat. I guess it would be when Asuka sleep walks into Shinji's bed, and Shinji almost kisses her. No it's not because I'm a perv, but because it shows how Shinji really feels towards Asuka. It also shows how weak willed Shinji is because he didn't kiss her.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Mon May 19, 2008 7:16 am Rei's sacrifice in Tears - made me cry the first time I saw it (before I knew she was only 'a bit dead'!) and I still think it's beautifully done; particularly with the DC additions. From EoE, my favourite is GNR spreading her wings and collecting souls during Instrumentality - seriously, wow!!

[]:             Quote Post by Stacifer » Mon May 19, 2008 9:58 am it's a difficult question, but in the series, it's the moment when Sahaquiel starts to fall and the Eva's pursue it. Just wow. The movement and everything. My boyfriend doesn't understand why I have to watch it over and over. EoE, all of it is pretty perfect to me, but Asuka's rant at Shinji, I really relate to how she feels. It's chilling for me as I've had a ridiculously similar experience in the past, the way Shinji begs Asuka to help him, and is afraid of Misato and the first child, and the easiest way to keep from getting hurt is to run to her...her answer to it, and his voilent reaction to Asuka's blunt rejection. And agh honeymoon to anxiety just really sets it too!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 19, 2008 10:10 am You talkin' about the strangling scene? It, One More Final (my all time favourite scene too) and Sandbox scenes are three perfect ones in all possible ways. And best scenes of the whole Evangelion. From the series itself... - Omedeto! - the iconic Rei and Asuka in elevator - Ep 19 fight and munching - Ep 18 fight - Reiquarium - Kaworu and SEELE in Ep 24 ( you know the "bla bla bla Pandora's Box bla bla bla") - Rei's death - The whole Ep 24 sequence with 9th Symphony (but this isn't considered, right?) - The first mindfuck in Ep 16 - Rei's Poem

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon May 19, 2008 10:28 am This scene might be my favorite... #21 wrote: AKAGI: Did you want something, Rei? Rei: I got lost. AKAGI: Oh, really? Then you want to leave here with me? Rei: That's okay. AKAGI: But you won't be able to get home by yourself, right? Rei: That's none of your business, you old hag. AKAGI: What? Rei: I can go home by myself, so leave me alone, you old hag. AKAGI: It's not nice to call someone an old hag. Rei: But you are an old hag, aren't you? AKAGI: I'm going to get mad. You need a good scolding from Director Ikari. Rei: That's what the Director calls you. AKAGI: That... Rei: He says, "That old hag is pushy," or that he, "doesn't need that old hag anymore." He says, "That old hag is pushy," or that he, "doesn't need that old hag anymore." He doesn't need that old hag anymore. Rei / YUI: It's what the Director calls you.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon May 19, 2008 12:22 pm I personally like the scene in episode 16 when Misato starts cry over Shinji because she thought he was gone for good earlier when he was in Leliel. It makes her seem 'motherly' to him than normal.

[]:             Quote Post by Kurochi » Mon May 19, 2008 3:24 pm Favorite scenes are hard to pick... In EoE, probably where the 9 MP eva's and Shinji ascend and make the Tree of Sephirot. I just thought it was a very good and quite sybolic animation. After that though, in EoE still, probably One More Final. In the series? All of episode 25.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon May 19, 2008 3:31 pm I always liked the harpy battle scene in EOE. Probably the best piece of action in the entire series. I know it's shallow but I really like the action parts.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Mon May 19, 2008 3:35 pm I thought of another one - 1st episode, when Ritsuko, Misato and Shinji are travelling to the command centre, and there's something sinister in the background... I think I like it so much because it took me about 3 viewings to actually notice it!

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon May 19, 2008 4:08 pm That bit when Pen Pen walks up to his fridge and extends his claw to press a button and it makes this WASHING! sound, then he gives Shinji that condescending look before he goes in.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 19, 2008 4:33 pm master_lloyd wrote: I always liked the harpy battle scene in EOE. Probably the best piece of action in the entire series. I know it's shallow but I really like the action parts.

[]:             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Mon May 19, 2008 8:11 pm The top three for me, after having years of evaluation at my disposal... 1. Eva-02 getting pierced by the rest of the spears. Just my favorite act of cold hard precision and brutality, visually. 2. Shinji meeting Kaworu....dammit I like all of their interactions (duh), but there's something special about that desolate setting, the sunset and all. Preferably the silent death version. 3. Every bousou scene is sweetly special and unique, but one that broke the mold (quite literally, actually) and happened to be my most favorite in terms of execution was Eva breaking out of Leliel's shadow. It was just creepy and bloody (lawl) powerful. Sure, Rei's smile and Yui-sama eating the S2 are perennial favorites, but I figured it wouldn't hurt to think a bit more on the subject. Certainly haven't posted like this on the subject of Eva in god knows how long.

For some odd reason I just like this scene. Maybe because it's charming or dramatic..
